caption: A man with distinctive, tall, light-colored hair and glasses wears a white button-down shirt, a red patterned bow tie, and suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting, wearing large black headphones and speaking into a professional microphone. In the background, a woman wearing a black t-shirt, a headwrap, and a black face mask stands looking down at a handheld device. The background includes a blurred sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed logo depicting a shield. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and red text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in position, slightly shifting his expression as he speaks, while the woman in the background remains largely stationary, continuing to look at her device.
